Localization.Description: An user failed to log in

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}. Logon attempts: {datafield1}.
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via {protocol.layer7}. Logon attempts: {datafield1}.
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via {protocol.layer7}. Logon attempts: {datafield1}.
A user from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via {protocol.layer7}. Logon attempts: {datafield1}.
